pending_context.whisper: a man came in and... only substitute because he has a dishonable discharge / refused to fight
pending_context.notes: "And a man came in and my parents never talked in front of me. And then I heard them whispering that he's a teacher, but he can only substitute because he has a dishonable discharge. Because during World War II, he jumped off a ship refusing to fight"; canonical first-person from 1950s SF Black-teacher network on the post-WWII dishonorable-discharge legacy of Black conscientious objectors and protest-deserters
Same as Pass 1 #48.13 — preserved as still-unverified; possibly Mr. Tolan or Tollman, LA County Schools

Are you sure you want to come?"; the surrounding context — a gatekeeper warning a non-Filipino Black guest — makes "I have to let you in" semantically inconsistent (he's challenging her presence, not admitting her). Likely Whisper for "I have to ask you" or "I have to warn you." Speaker-originating ambiguity; cannot recover. Flag for adversarial.

Pass 2 #48.P2.37 noted as unrecoverable; Pass 4 narrows the candidate set. Context: speaker is on LAUSD book committee, sees Black-person token-image stuck at end of textbook chapter with no chapter content about them; she calls the situation an emotional descriptor. "Mortifying" is the strongest phonetic + semantic match for "myth-hoofling" — both have the m-/-f-/-ling syllable structure and "mortifying" fits the speaker's outrage-at-tokenism register. Upgrade from low → medium; flag adversarial.

pending_context.candidate_correction: (uncertain — Camp Pendleton candidate strongest; possibly "in compound" or "compared")
pending_context.notes: Pass 3 recommended DROP. Pass 4 re-examination: full surrounding context is "I hadn't been in Los Angeles for 20 years. It was something else to see the sky full of helicopters at Camp Nou. That's right. I knew how to work the projects." Speaker is contrasting LA helicopter density (LAPD "ghetto birds") to her current Ohio context. "Camp Nou" cannot be Camp Pendleton (which is SD County, not LA, and not a helicopter-density site). Most-likely candidate: Whisper has garbled "in Compton" (LA city with high LAPD-helicopter presence) — "Compton" → "Camp Nou" is phonetically plausible. Retain as low + flag adversarial; do not drop, as "Compton" is highly probable.
